title: IARC science at AGU 2023
summary: Dozens of IARC researchers and students are participating in the 2023 American Geophysical Union fall meeting held both virtually and in San Fransisco this December. We hope to connect with our colleagues and friends during the following presentations and events. For those in San Fransisco, please also stop by the University of Alaska Fairbanks booth (location coming soon) which is co-hosted by the IARC science communications team. In addition to...
